test.observation: All 4 internal packages passed (auth, proxy, sandbox, server). Cmd packages have no test files.

frontend-build.observation: Vite build successful with hashed assets (index-4UYezCQ3.js, index-D-d1h17n.css).

rejectedObservations.observation: Node B deployment commands (ssh, nixos-rebuild) should be added to services.yaml
rejectedObservations.reason: Node B deployment commands are production-specific operations that differ from local development commands. The services.yaml is designed for local development operations. Production deployment commands belong in deployment documentation, not services.yaml.
rejectedObservations.evidence: Worker transcripts showed ssh node-b commands for nixos-rebuild switch

reviewDetails.summary: Successfully replaced placeholder deploy artifact with real built Svelte frontend. flake.nix correctly uses buildNpmPackage with proper source filtering and Caddy routing preserved prefix-stable routing. npmDepsHash placeholder correctly set for Node B resolution. VAL-DEPLOY-001 and VAL-DEPLOY-006 satisfied.

npmDepsHash resolved correctly on first attempt using prefetch-npm-deps. x86_64-linux build on Node B succeeded without hash adjustments. Public verification at https://draft.choir-ip.com/ serves built SPA with real hashed assets. All 5 services healthy post-deploy. Library documentation updated with npmDepsHash workflow.

Proxy /api/* catch-all hardened to auth-gate all routes, returning 401 for signed-out callers on unknown paths. 12 comprehensive tests added (7 auth cookie contract, 5 proxy fail-closed). All three validation assertions fulfilled: VAL-DEPLOY-003, VAL-DEPLOY-004, VAL-DEPLOY-005. Library documentation added for cookie contract and proxy routing.

32 Playwright tests added covering all 9 validation assertions (VAL-DEPLOY-002, VAL-CROSS-101–108). Two test files: deploy-readiness-browser-contract.spec.js (22 tests local) and deployed-origin-auth-shell.spec.js (10 tests deployed origin). Virtual-authenticator harness used for passkey ceremonies. Library documentation added with comprehensive verification state.

Comprehensive hardening of Node B production safety. VAL-DEPLOY-007: Localhost-only binding (127.0.0.1) as defense-in-depth. VAL-DEPLOY-008: Proxy health endpoint reporting upstream sandbox reachability. VAL-CROSS-118: Session persistence across auth restarts via SQLite + refresh token rotation. 11 new tests covering restart scenarios, health transitions, binding behavior. Systemd hardening in nix/node-b.nix with ProtectSystem, PrivateTmp, WatchdogSec.

All 70 golangci-lint blockers cleared. 70 errcheck issues fixed with explicit _ = error handling for Close, Setenv, Unsetenv, SetReadDeadline, json.Encode/Decode, Signal, Write, httpServer.Shutdown. 2 unused functions removed: getAndValidateChallenge, pemEncodeBlock. All validators pass with 0 issues.

library: nixos-config.md - Documents npmDepsHash resolution, Node B verification
deploy-cookie-contract.md - Documents cookie contract and proxy fail-closed routing
deploy-readiness-browser-contract.md - Documents 9 validation assertions and test mappings
restart-readiness.md - Documents exposure control, health checking, recovery paths
conventions: Dual-lockfile approach: pnpm-lock.yaml for local, package-lock.json for Nix reproducibility
Data attributes (data-auth-entry, data-shell, etc.) for Playwright test selectors
Virtual-authenticator harness for WebAuthn/passkey ceremonies in tests
